title: Method for producing a data carrier and data carrier
abstract: The invention relates to a method for producing a data carrier, in particular formed as an IC card. At least one flat layer (2) each made of a desired plastic material is provided, the color of the at least one layer (2) being a result of the desired plastic material. A substantially flat data carrier body (1) is manufactured from the at least one flat layer (2), the data carrier having a circumferential edge (3). Finally, a desired color on the circumferential edge (3) of the data carrier body (1) is applied.
claims:
Claims P a t e n t c l a i m s A method for producing a data carrier, in particular formed as an IC card, comprising the steps of: a) providing at least one flat layer (2) each made of a desired plastic material, the color of the at least one layer (2) being a result of the desired plastic material; b) manufacturing a substantially flat data carrier body (1) from the at least one flat layer (2), the data carrier having a circumferential edge (3); and c) applying a desired color on the circumferential edge (3) of the data carrier body (1). The method according to claim 1, wherein the step of manufacturing the data carrier body (1) comprises providing an upper cover layer (4) having a desired color or design, wherein the color on the circumferential edge (3) of the data carrier is adapted to the color or design of the upper cover layer (2). The method according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the step of applying the desired color comprises spraying with a spraying unit (10) the color on the circumferential edge (3). The method according to claim 3, wherein the spraying unit (10) is moved (circled) around the data carrier body (1). The method according to claim 4 or 5, wherein the data carrier body (1) is turned while the spraying unit (10) is fixed or is moved in a direction orthogonal to a direction of extension of the data carrier body (1). 

 The method according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the step of applying the desired color comprises a color transfer by means of a spinning tool (20) which is soaked with the desired color. The method according to claim 6, wherein the spinning tool is pressed against the edge (3) of the data carrier body (1). The method according to claim 6 or 7, wherein the spinning tool (20) is made of a harder material than the data carrier body (1). The method according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the step of applying the desired color comprises applying of a colored foil which is coated with an adhesive to the circumferential edge (3). The method according to claim 9, wherein the adhesive properties of the adhesive are activated by a step of heating the adhesive. The method according to claim 10, wherein activation of the adhesive is made by applying the colored foil with a heated rotating roller which presses, at the time of applying the colored foil, the colored foil to the edge (3) of the data carrier body (1). The method according to one of the preceding claims, wherein a plurality of data carrier bodies is stacked atop each other to form a pile, before the step of applying the desired color on the circumferential edge (3) is carried out. 

 The method according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the data carrier body (1) or the pile of data carrier bodies is punched or cut to provide sharp/ straight edges. A data carrier, in particular formed as an IC card, comprising: a) a substantially flat data carrier body (1) having a circumferential edge (3) and consisting of at least one flat layer (2), each of the at least one flat layer (2) being made of a desired plastic material, the color of the at least one layer (2) being a result of the desired plastic material; b) a thin layer (2) of a desired color on the circumferential edge (3) of the data carrier body (1) covering the color of the at least one layer (2) resulting from the desired plastic material of the at least one layer (2). 15. The data carrier according to claim 14, wherein the at least one layer (2) is transparent or white.
